title: Saudi Beef Shawarma
description: A popular street food in Saudi Arabia, this shawarma recipe features thinly sliced beef, roasted to perfection and served in a warm flatbread with fresh tomatoes.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the sliced beef to the bowl and toss to coat.
4. Grill the beef for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
5. Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 350°F (180°C) for 5 minutes.
6. Assemble the shawarma by placing a few slices of the grilled beef onto each piece of flatbread.
7. Top with sliced tomatoes and serve immediately.
